name: Vegetable Beef with Rice Cakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Beef steak, cut 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw rice cake rolls in the refrigerator overnight. Let stand at room temperature for 2 hours before cooking.
2. Partially freeze beef. Bias-slice beef across the grain into thin bite-size strips.
3. Place beef in a plastic bag set in a deep bowl. Combine soy sauce, sherry, 2 green onions, and gingerroot. Pour over beef. Close bag.
4. Marinate in the refrigerator for 1 to 2 hours, turning the bag occasionally to distribute marinade.
5. Drain well, reserving marinade.
6. Bias-slice rice cake rolls into 1/4 inch slices.
7. Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a wok. Add bok choy, mushrooms, bamboo shoots, 2 green onions, and chives. Stir-fry for 3 minutes or until bok choy is crisp-tender.
8. Remove vegetables and juices from the wok.
9. Heat remaining oil in the wok. Add beef. Stir-fry for 3 minutes or until no longer pink.
10. Remove from wok. Add 1/4 cup chicken broth and reserved marinade to the wok. Add sliced rice cake rolls. Stir constantly for 2 to 3 minutes, or until rice cake slices soften, add more chicken broth as necessary to prevent rice cake slices from sticking together.
11. Return beef and vegetables to wok. Heat through.
12. Serve immediately. Makes 4 servings.
